name: LED Light Module – 0.72W/12V – IP65 – 100pcs Set – Black Body
description: ZION LED USA Modules are excellent for illuminating signs or outlining windows. Anyone can install these with ease because they wire directly into a standard 12V outlet with no driver required. These lights are safe for outdoor use and protected from rain, snow, and weak jets of water, such as sprinklers. LED Modules are perfect for gas stations, grocery stores, and shopping centers.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 0.72W/module Brightness: 50–65 lm/module Colors: Cool White, Warm White, Red, Green, Blue, RGB Voltage: 12V AC Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 100 lm/W CRI: 80+ Viewing Angle: 120–160° Dimmable: Yes Temp Range: -20°C to 60°C Material: PC Housing Color: Black Lens: Clear Waterproof: IP65 Certification: UL Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years Length: 48 ft
